---
title: "Code Availability Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-float: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

# Keywords in protocol order
code_keywords <- c("code", "script", "osf", "github", "supplement",
                   "replicate", "reproduce", "zenodo", "appendix")

# Data file — update this path to match your batch file
data_file <- "pilot-data.rds"

if (file.exists(data_file)) {
  articles <- readRDS(data_file)
} else {
  stop(paste("Data file not found:", data_file))
}

# Remove invisible Unicode characters that PDF extraction inserts into URLs
# (zero-width space, zero-width non-joiner/joiner, soft hyphen, BOM)
clean_url <- function(url) {
  str_remove_all(url, "[​‌‍­﻿]")
}

# Extract all unique URLs from a character vector of text snippets
extract_urls <- function(texts) {
  texts <- texts[!is.na(texts)]
  matches <- str_extract_all(texts, "https?://[^\\s<>\"'\\)\\]]+")
  urls <- unique(unlist(matches))
  unique(sapply(urls, clean_url, USE.NAMES = FALSE))
}

# Wrap URLs in text with clickable <a> tags (cleans href, keeps display text clean too)
linkify <- function(text) {
  if (is.na(text) || nchar(text) == 0) return(text)
  str_replace_all(text,
    "(https?://[^\\s<>\"'\\)\\]]+)",
    function(url) {
      clean <- clean_url(url)
      sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>', clean, clean)
    })
}

# Bold code keywords and linkify URLs in a block of text
highlight_text <- function(text, keywords) {
  if (is.na(text) || nchar(text) == 0) return(text)
  for (kw in keywords) {
    text <- str_replace_all(text,
      regex(paste0("\\b", kw, "\\w*"), ignore_case = TRUE),
      function(m) paste0("<strong>", m, "</strong>"))
  }
  linkify(text)
}
```

```{r report, results='asis'}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(articles))) {
  article     <- articles[i, ]
  keyword_df  <- article$keyword_data[[1]]

  context_texts <- if (!is.null(keyword_df) && nrow(keyword_df) > 0)
    keyword_df$context else character(0)

  # Use pre-extracted URLs from XML pipeline if available (cleaner, includes
  # hyperlinks from the PDF's link layer). Fall back to regex for PDF-sourced data.
  all_urls <- if ("urls" %in% names(article) && length(article$urls[[1]]) > 0) {
    article$urls[[1]]
  } else {
    extract_urls(c(article$abstract, context_texts))
  }

  bold_abstract <- highlight_text(article$abstract, code_keywords)

  # ── Article header (used as TOC entry) ──────────────────────────────────
  cat(sprintf("\n\n## %d. %s\n\n", i, article$title))

  # ── Metadata ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat(sprintf('**DOI:** %s  \n', article$DOI))
  cat(sprintf('**Link:** <a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>\n\n',
              article$`DOI Link`, article$`DOI Link`))

  # ── Abstract ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat("**Abstract**\n\n")
  cat('<div style="margin-bottom:1em;">', bold_abstract, "</div>\n\n")

  # ── Keyword matches ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!is.null(keyword_df) && nrow(keyword_df) > 0) {
    cat("**Keyword Matches**\n\n")
    for (kw in code_keywords) {
      contexts <- keyword_df$context[keyword_df$keyword == kw]
      if (length(contexts) == 0) next
      cat(sprintf("*%s*\n\n", kw))
      for (ctx in contexts) {
        ctx_hl <- str_replace_all(ctx,
          regex(paste0("\\b", kw, "\\w*"), ignore_case = TRUE),
          function(m) paste0("<strong>", m, "</strong>"))
        ctx_hl <- linkify(ctx_hl)
        cat(sprintf('<blockquote>%s</blockquote>\n\n', ctx_hl))
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("*No keyword matches found.*\n\n")
  }

  # ── Links found in paper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (length(all_urls) > 0) {
    cat("**Links Found in Paper**\n\n")
    for (url in all_urls) {
      cat(sprintf('- <a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>\n', url, url))
    }
    cat("\n")
  }

  cat("\n---\n")
}
```
